!! v2.3.3

* Fix: correct settings deeplink to `tidgi://{workspaceID}/preferences/server` to match the latest TidGi deeplink protocol (the `workspace` alias is no longer supported).

!! v2.3.2

* Fix: hide connected-client list when HTTP API is not enabled. The fieldset was rendered outside the conditional block.
* Fix: restore button border lost by `tc-btn-invisible`. Remove `tc-btn-invisible` from the link and use `<<colour muted-foreground>>` for `border-color` (vanilla palette's `button-border` is empty).
* Fix: change settings deeplink from `tidgi://preferences/` (global) to `tidgi://workspace/{workspaceID}/preferences/server` (workspace-scoped, correct "博客和服务器设置" section).

!! v2.3.1

* Fix: remove duplicated `<$reveal>` blocks in `SidebarDesktopContent` where both the outer `match`/`nomatch` and the inner `<% else %>` rendered the same HTTP API hint + settings button.
* Fix: replace `<$link to="tidgi://..." external="yes">` with plain `<a>` tag; the `<$link>` widget does not reliably handle custom protocol URIs.
* Refactor: split `style.tid` into `style-variable.tid` (palette colors via `<<colour>>` + `<<sidebarbreakpoint>>` media queries) and `style.css` (pure layout CSS).
* Style: use `<<colour button-border>>` from the vanilla palette for the Open Settings button instead of hardcoded `#ccc`.

!! v2.3.0

* Feat: add "Open Settings" button below the HTTP API required hint. Clicking opens TidGi Desktop preferences and jumps to the External API section via `tidgi://preferences/externalAPI` deeplink.
* Cleanup: remove legacy ServerList UI and SidebarMobileContent. These were only used for the now-unsupported Tiddloid app; server management is handled natively in TidGi-Mobile.

!! v2.2.0

* Not documented.

!! v2.1.6

* CI: skip Playwright E2E job when no `.ts` test files exist in `wiki/tiddlers/tests/playwright`.

!! v2.1.5

* Fix `merge-incoming` endpoint to resolve TidGi Desktop services at request time instead of module-load time, matching the fix already applied to other Git endpoints. This ensures startup-provided `gitServer` and `workspace` services are used reliably in mock-server and Desktop worker environments.

!! v2.1.4

* Fix `receive-bundle` endpoint to reset the `mobile-incoming` ref before fetching a new bundle. This prevents "non-fast-forward" failures when the same workspace is re-imported or synced from a fresh mobile device after the server repository changed.

!! v2.1.3

* i18n: migrate remaining hardcoded UI strings (workspace token security warning, TidGi HTTP API hint).
* i18n: localize Git sync status messages shown in connected-client list (`GitSync/*`, `GitSyncSummary/*`).
* i18n: refactor plugin readme to `<<lingo>>` macros with `Readme/*` translation keys.
* Add server-side `lingo()` helper for Node.js endpoint handlers.

!! v2.1.2

* Fix QR codes not appearing when `localIPCount` is set but `$:/info/url/localIP/*` tiddlers are missing (regression from v2.0.9 multi-NIC support).
* Move the QR `image` macro into `DesktopGitSyncQR` so transclusion always has access to it.
* Restore connected-client tracking on Git sync endpoints (`receive-bundle`, `merge-incoming`, `create-bundle`) after v1 sync API removal.
* Show recently synced content again via merge commit diff summary on `merge-incoming`.
* Prune stale client-status tiddlers when polling `/tw-mobile-sync/client-info`.
* Remove unused legacy UI: skinny HTML QR, pull-and-override download, broken scan-QR widget, and broken sync buttons.
* Remove orphaned v1 sync data layer (`mergeTiddler`, `filterOutNotSyncedTiddlers`, sync endpoint types, etc.).

!! v2.1.1

* Fix missing changelog entry for v2.1.0.
* Fix `.multids` file format issues.

!! v2.1.0

* Internationalization (i18n) support: migrate all hardcoded bilingual UI text to `<<lingo>>` macro with `.multids` locale files.
** New `language/en-GB/Translations.multids` and `language/zh-Hans/Translations.multids`.
** Sidebar tab caption, button labels, form legends, settings descriptions, QR instructions, and warnings now switch language automatically based on wiki locale.
** Consistency: follow the same lingo pattern used by the `itonnote` plugin by the same author.

!! v2.0.9

* Show multiple QR codes for multi-NIC devices. The HTTP server now listens on `0.0.0.0` and the QR tab iterates over all local IPs, showing one QR code per network interface with its URL displayed below.
* Compatibility: this release is intended for TidGi Desktop `>= 0.13.1` with the matching HTTP API info injection update.

!! v2.0.8

* Fix Desktop packaged runtime compatibility by removing external `rxjs` and `tslib` requirements from the Smart HTTP implementation. The plugin now ships its own lightweight response stream and does not require TidGi Desktop to copy those packages into the wiki worker runtime.
* Fix Git endpoint service discovery by resolving TidGi Desktop services at request time instead of module-load time, so startup-provided `gitServer` and `workspace` services are used reliably.
* Add and verify the Desktop GitRunner path used by TidGi Mobile sync tests, so mobile sync now covers the same `gitServer` delegation path used inside TidGi Desktop.
* Compatibility: this release is intended for TidGi Desktop `>= 0.13.1` and TidGi Mobile `>= 0.10.2`. Older Desktop or Mobile builds should keep using tw-mobile-sync `<= 2.0.7` because they do not include the matching Smart HTTP and mobile sync integration behavior.

!! v1.1.0

* Fix System Tiddler Sync: Now correctly syncs modified system and shadow tiddlers (e.g. plugin configs)
** Updated incremental sync filter to `[all[shadows+tiddlers]]` to catch updates in overridden shadow tiddlers

!! v1.0.0 - Enhanced Sync with Deletion Tracking and 3-Way Merge

!!! Features

* Bidirectional Deletion Sync: Implemented proper deletion synchronization between TidGi-Desktop and TidGi-Mobile
** Desktop → Mobile: Detects deleted tiddlers from git history and syncs them to mobile
** Mobile → Desktop: Syncs mobile deletions to desktop and properly removes files via FileSystemAdaptor
** Handles rename operations correctly (rename = delete old + create new)

* 3-Way Merge for Conflict Resolution: Intelligent merge algorithm using git history
** Retrieves base version (common ancestor) from git at `lastSync` timestamp
** Uses TiddlyWiki's built-in `diff-match-patch` library (Google's diff-match-patch)
** Automatically merges non-conflicting changes from both sides
** Marks conflicts with clear indicators when both sides modify the same content
** Falls back to simple "newer version wins" strategy if base version unavailable

* Git Service Integration: New methods added to TidGi-Desktop's git service
** `getDeletedTiddlersSinceDate(wikiFolderPath, sinceDate)`: Extracts deleted tiddler titles from git history
** `getTiddlerAtTime(wikiFolderPath, tiddlerTitle, beforeDate)`: Retrieves tiddler content at specific point in time
** Both methods accessible via `global.service.git` in TiddlyWiki plugins

!!! Technical Details

* Deletion tracking works by:
** Parsing git log with `--diff-filter=D` to find deleted `.tid` and `.meta` files
** Extracting `title:` field from deleted files in git history
** Sending deletion list to mobile via `ISyncEndPointResponse.deletes`

* 3-way merge algorithm:
** Base version: Retrieved from git at `clientLastSync` timestamp
** Ours version: Client (mobile) current version
** Theirs version: Server (desktop) current version
** Creates patches from base→ours and base→theirs
** Applies both patch sets sequentially to merge changes

* File cleanup improvements:
** Mobile now properly deletes filesystem files when receiving server deletions
** Desktop's FileSystemAdaptor automatically handles file deletion on `deleteTiddler()`

!!! Merge Scenarios

* No conflict: If only one side modified, uses that side's changes
* Different sections: If both sides modified different parts, merges both changes
* Real conflict: If both sides modified same content, marks with `<!-- MERGE CONFLICT: ... -->` comment

!!! Fallback Behavior

* If git history unavailable: Falls back to "newer modified time wins" strategy
* If 3-way merge fails: Uses simple merge with newer version
* Ensures sync continues even if advanced features fail

!!! Dependencies

* Requires TidGi-Desktop with git service support
* Uses `$:/core/modules/utils/diff-match-patch/diff_match_patch.js` from TiddlyWiki core
* Mobile deletion tracking via SQLite `TiddlerChangeSQLModel` table

!!! Breaking Changes

None. All changes are backward compatible with graceful fallbacks.

!!! Bug Fixes

* Fixed deletion sync not working from desktop to mobile
* Fixed rename operations not syncing properly
* Fixed filesystem files not being cleaned up on mobile after server-side deletion

\define makeGitQRData()
{
  "baseUrl": "$(baseUrl)$",
  "workspaceId": "$(workspaceId)$",
  "workspaceName": "$(workspaceName)$",
  "token": "$(token)$",
  "tokenAuthHeaderName": "$(tokenAuthHeaderName)$",
  "tokenAuthHeaderValue": "$(tokenAuthHeaderValue)$",
  "subWorkspaces": $(subWorkspaces)$
}
\end

\define image()
<img src=<<makeqr text:"""$(content)$""" size:"""$(size)$""">>/>
\end

\define qrBlock()
<$let 
  baseUrl="$(url)$"
  content=<<makeGitQRData>>
>
  <div style="margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 0.9em;">
    <a href=<<url>> target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style="word-break: break-all;">
      <$text text={{{ [<url>split[/]nth[3]] }}}}/>
    </a>
  </div>
  <<image>>

  <details style="margin-top: 10px;">
    <summary><<lingo DesktopGitSyncQR/ShowQRData>></summary>
    <pre><<content>></pre>
  </details>
</$let>
\end

\define originQrBlock()
<$let 
  url={{$:/info/url/origin}}
>
  <<qrBlock>>
</$let>
\end

<div class="tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-qrcode">
  <$let 
    memeloopNodeUrl={{$:/info/tidgi/memeloopNodeUrl}}
    workspaceId={{$:/info/tidgi/workspaceID}}
    workspaceName={{$:/info/tidgi/workspaceName}}
    token={{$:/info/tidgi/workspaceToken}}
    tokenAuthHeaderName={{$:/info/tidgi/tokenAuthHeaderName}}
    tokenAuthHeaderValue={{$:/info/tidgi/tokenAuthHeaderValue}}
    subWorkspaces={{$:/info/tidgi/subWorkspaces}}
    size={{{ [{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/sidebarwidth}getSidebarWidthInPx[]] }}}
  >
    <% if [<workspaceId>match[]] %>
      <div class="tc-error">
        <<lingo DesktopGitSyncQR/WorkspaceIDError>>
      </div>
    <% else %>
      <div><<lingo DesktopGitSyncQR/ScanInstructions>></div>

      <% if [<memeloopNodeUrl>!match[]] %>
        <!-- Custom memeloopNodeUrl is set: show single QR with custom URL -->
        <$let url={{{ [<memeloopNodeUrl>match[]then{$:/info/url/origin}else<memeloopNodeUrl>] }}}>
          <<qrBlock>>
        </$let>
      <% else %>
        <% if [{$:/info/url/localIPs}jsonindexes[]limit[1]!match[]] %>
          <!-- New upstream format: iterate over JSON array of all local URLs (multi-NIC support) -->
          <$list filter="[{$:/info/url/localIPs}jsonindexes[]]" variable="ipIndex">
            <div style="margin-bottom: 20px; text-align: center; border-bottom: 1px solid <<colour tiddler-border>>; padding-bottom: 16px;">
              <$let url={{{ [{$:/info/url/localIPs}jsonget<ipIndex>] }}}>
                <<qrBlock>>
              </$let>
            </div>
          </$list>
        <% elseif [prefix[$:/info/url/localIP/]limit[1]!match[]] %>
          <!-- Legacy per-IP tiddlers (TidGi Desktop < 0.13.x) -->
          <$list filter="[prefix[$:/info/url/localIP/]sort[]]" variable="ipTiddler">
            <div style="margin-bottom: 20px; text-align: center; border-bottom: 1px solid <<colour tiddler-border>>; padding-bottom: 16px;">
              <$let url={{{ [<ipTiddler>get[text]] }}}>
                <<qrBlock>>
              </$let>
            </div>
          </$list>
        <% else %>
          <!-- Fallback: single QR using origin when localIP info is unavailable -->
          <<originQrBlock>>
        <% endif %>
      <% endif %>

      <!-- Security Warning -->
      <% if [<token>match[]] %>
        <div style="margin: 10px 0; padding: 10px; background-color:<<colour alert-background>>; border: 1px solid <<colour alert-border>>; color:<<colour alert-muted-foreground>>; border-radius: 4px;">
          <<lingo DesktopGitSyncQR/NoTokenWarning>>
        </div>
      <% endif %>
    <% endif %>
  </$let>
</div>
"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/Sidebar/SidebarDesktopContent":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/Sidebar/SidebarDesktopContent","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\procedure lingo-base() $:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/language/

<<lingo SidebarDesktopContent/QRCodeTitle>>

<!-- Works on TidGi with enableHTTPAPI, or nodejs that is not TidGi Desktop -->
<% if [{$:/info/tidgi/enableHTTPAPI}match[yes]]:else[{$:/info/tidgi}!match[yes]] %>

  {{$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/Sidebar/DesktopGitSyncQR}}

  <fieldset class="tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-fieldset tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-desktop">
    <legend>
    <% if [[$:/temp/tw-mobile-sync/listen-client-info]get[text]compare:eq[yes]] %>
      <<lingo SidebarDesktopContent/ConnectedClients>>
    <% else %>
    <$button>
      <$action-sendmessage $message="tm-tw-mobile-sync-listen-client-info" />
      <<lingo SidebarDesktopContent/ViewConnectedClients>>
    </$button>
    <% endif %>
    </legend>

    <$vars compare-put-host-to-end="[get[Origin]prefix[http]else[1]]" compare-put-active-to-start="[get[state]prefix[onlineActive]else[1]]">
      <$list filter="[prefix[$:/state/tw-mobile-sync/clientStatus/]sortsub:number<compare-put-active-to-start>sortsub:number<compare-put-host-to-end>]">
        <div class="tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-desktop-server-item">
          <h2><$text text={{!!name}} /></h2>
          <h3>{{!!state}}</h3>
          <span>{{!!User-Agent}}</span>
          <pre>{{!!recentlySyncedString}}</pre>
        </div>
      </$list>
    </$vars>
  </fieldset>

<% else %>

  <<lingo SidebarDesktopContent/HTTPAPIRequired>>
  <div style="margin-top: 8px;">
    <$vars deeplink={{{ [{$:/info/tidgi/workspaceID}addprefix[tidgi://]addsuffix[/preferences/server]] }}}>
      <a href=<<deeplink>> class="tw-mobile-sync-open-settings-btn">
        <<lingo SidebarDesktopContent/OpenHTTPAPISettings>>
      </a>
    </$vars>
  </div>

<% endif %>"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/Sidebar/SidebarTab":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/Sidebar/SidebarTab","tags":"$:/tags/SideBar","caption":"<<lingo SidebarTab/Caption $:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/language/>>","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<div class="tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-desktop-content">

</div>"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/Sidebar/style-variable.css":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/Sidebar/style-variable.css","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\import [[$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/base]]

.tw-mobile-sync-open-settings-btn {
  border-color: <<colour muted-foreground>>;
}

@media (min-width: <<sidebarbreakpoint>>) {
  .tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-mobile-content {
    display: none;
  }
}

@media (max-width: <<sidebarbreakpoint>>) {
  .tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-desktop-content {
    display: none;
  }
}
"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/Sidebar/style.css":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/Sidebar/style.css","text":".tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-mobile-content,
.tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-desktop-content {
  width: 100%;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  align-items: center;
}

.tw-mobile-sync-open-settings-btn {
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  cursor: pointer;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: inline-block;
  background: none;
  color: inherit;
  border-width: 1px;
  border-style: solid;
}
","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/style.css":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/tw-mobile-sync/ui/style.css","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$importvariables filter="[[$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/base]]">

.tw-mobile-sync-server-list {
  padding-left: 0;
  overflow: auto;
  overflow: overlay;
}

.tw-mobile-sync-copy-button {
  height: 100%;
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center;
  margin-left: 10px !important;
}

.tw-mobile-sync-new-server-field-fields-container-outer2 textarea,
.tw-mobile-sync-new-server-field-fields-container-outer2 input {
  width: 100%;
}
.tw-mobile-sync-new-server-field-fields-container-outer2 {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column;
}
.tw-mobile-sync-new-server-field-fields-container {
  display: flex; flex-direction: row; justify-content: center; align-items: center;
}
.tw-mobile-sync-new-server-field-fields-container-outer1 {
  display: flex; flex-direction: row;
}
@media (max-width: 535px) {
  .tw-mobile-sync-new-server-field-fields-container-outer1 {
    flex-direction: column;
  }
}
.tw-mobile-sync-new-server-field-fields-buttons {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center;
}
@media (max-width: 535px) {
  .tw-mobile-sync-new-server-field-fields-container {
    flex-direction: column;
  }
  .tw-mobile-sync-new-server-field-fields-buttons {
    width: 100%;
    flex-direction: row;
    justify-content: space-between;
    margin-top: 10px;
  }
}

.tw-mobile-sync-existed-server-field-fields-container {
  display: flex; flex-direction: row;
}
.tw-mobile-sync-existed-server-field-fields-buttons {
  display: flex; flex-direction: row; justify-content: space-between;
}


.tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-fieldset {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center;
  width: 100%;

  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-desktop-server-item {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-desktop-server-item h3, .tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-desktop-server-item h5 {
  margin: 0;
}
.tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-desktop-server-item h5 {
  font-weight: 700;
}
.tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-desktop-server-item p:last-child {
  margin-bottom: 15px;
}

.tw-mobile-sync-server-list-item {
  display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
}
@media (max-width: 535px) {
  .tw-mobile-sync-server-list-item {
    flex-direction: column;
  }
}

.tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-qrcode {
  width: auto;
  height: auto;
}
.tw-mobile-sync-sidebar-qrcode img {
  width: calc({{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/sidebarwidth}} - 2em);
  height: calc({{$:/themes/tiddlywiki/vanilla/metrics/sidebarwidth}} - 2em);
}
